summary: Very poor cassette‑sourced recording riddled with heavy EQ and digital noise reduction; no musical highlights mentioned.
review: The sole reviewer condemns the source as a heavily EQ'd cassette masquerading as a PCM, noting obnoxious digital noise reduction and persistent hiss between tracks. No comments are made about the band's performance, so the musical quality cannot be assessed from this review.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review focusing on terrible recording quality; no positive show information to offset the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Cassette source heavily EQ'd, heavy digital noise reduction between songs, noticeable hiss and low fidelity.
